mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in retail sales signals resilient household demand and near-term revenue support for index constituents, causing higher S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS momentum is followed by lower 20-day S&P 500 returns than lower momentum states in more than 60% of walk-forward test windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in the federal funds rate signals emergency monetary easing in response to financial stress; during such episodes, the stress information dominates discount-rate relief and causes negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS falls by at least 0.75pp over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2008-06-15 the Federal Reserve had cut rates aggressively during the credit-stress period
failure_condition: Reject if triggered episodes produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of out-of-sample cases or if the mean triggered return is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained contraction in housing starts reduces construction activity, household wealth, and bank credit quality, causing weaker earnings expectations and negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its 12-month moving average and is down more than 10% year over year
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2008-06-15 the housing downturn was visible in released housing-starts data
failure_condition: Reject if 60-day S&P 500 returns after the trigger are positive in more than 55% of instances or are not statistically below returns when HOUST is above its 12-month moving average.

mechanism_narrative: An increase in unemployment combined with falling payroll employment confirms labor-market deterioration, reducing household income expectations and corporate revenue forecasts, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises at least 0.3pp over 3 months while PAYEMS 3-month change is negative
failure_condition: Reject if the joint UNRATE-up and PAYEMS-down trigger does not underperform single-series labor signals or if triggered 20-day returns exceed the unconditional mean in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production signals weakening real activity in cyclical sectors and falling operating leverage, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days when production momentum turns down.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 3-month growth turns negative after being positive in the prior 3-month window
failure_condition: Reject if negative INDPRO momentum is not associated with lower subsequent 60-day S&P 500 returns than positive INDPRO momentum in at least two consecutive walk-forward evaluation windows.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer prices while the federal funds rate is not rising compresses real policy restraint credibility and profit margins, increasing inflation-risk premia and causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized growth rises while FEDFUNDS is flat or lower over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if the CPIAUCSL-up and FEDFUNDS-flat-or-down interaction does not predict lower 20-day returns than either CPIAUCSL acceleration alone or FEDFUNDS decline alone.

mechanism_narrative: Positive real GDP growth momentum signals broad demand expansion and earnings support, causing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days when the latest released GDP level exceeds its prior-quarter level.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 latest released quarter is above the prior released quarter
failure_condition: Reject if positive GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter changes are followed by below-median 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of walk-forward observations.

mechanism_narrative: A low and falling unemployment rate signals tight labor conditions without immediate recession risk, supporting consumer spending and earnings revisions, causing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE is below its 12-month moving average and falls from the prior month
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with still-improving labor conditions
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have a negative average 5-day S&P 500 return or if the hit rate for positive 5-day returns is below 50% in out-of-sample testing.
